title: Genomics and Functional Genomics of Malignant Pleural Mesothelioma.
author: Cakiroglu E Senturk S
content: S-EPMC7504302 PMC7504302 Genomics and Functional Genomics of Malignant Pleural Mesothelioma. Malignant pleural mesothelioma (MPM) is a rare, aggressive cancer of the mesothelial cells lining the pleural surface of the chest wall and lung.
